entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation_Rule11 Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE List PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <List> <Link created="1747889585084" displayName="CN=Cindy Little-ADM,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" id="a9feffec96f31fd98196f6567bbc0275" lastRefresh="1763401647150" manuallyCorrelated="true" modified="1763398095284" identity="CN=Cindy Little-ADM,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" significantModified="1763398095284" uuid="{f0dcbca7-51bd-42b5-a612-c24f48cc03ba}"> <ApplicationRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.Application" id="ActiveDirectory" name="ActiveDirectory"/> </ApplicationRef> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="accountFlags"> <value> <List> <String>Normal User Account</String> </List> </value> </entry> <entry key="cn" value="Cindy Little-ADM"/> <entry key="distinguishedName" value="CN=Cindy Little-ADM,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com"/> <entry key="givenName" value="Cindy"/> <entry key="memberOf"/> <entry key="msDS-PrincipalName" value="ESHIAM\Cindy Little-ADM"/> <entry key="msNPAllowDialin" value="Not Set"/> <entry key="objectClass"> <value> <List> <String>top</String> <String>person</String> <String>organizationalPerson</String> <String>user</String> </List> </value> </entry> <entry key="objectSid" value="S-1-5-21-2678700903-2778472132-3948167259-1438"/> <entry key="objectType" value="user"/> <entry key="objectguid" value="{f0dcbca7-51bd-42b5-a612-c24f48cc03ba}"/> <entry key="sAMAccountName" value="Cindy Little-ADM"/> <entry key="sn" value="Little"/> </Map> </Attributes> </Link> </List>
